name: Impossible Mushroom Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Heat butter and oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add mushrooms and cook for 4 to 5 minutes until they are browned on all sides but not burnt.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and tarragon.
5. Pour the vegetable mixture into a greased 10-inch pie plate.
6. Sprinkle shredded Swiss cheese, chopped green onions, and remaining dried tarragon over the vegetables.
7. In a separate bowl, whisk together the remaining ingredients (baking mix, eggs, salt) until smooth.
8. Pour the batter over the vegetable mixture in the pie plate.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the filling is set.
10. Allow the pie to stand for 5 minutes before serving.
11. Garnish with sliced tomatoes and fresh parsley, if desired.
